🕌 Moscow to Istanbul: Complete Cheap Flights Guide

2026-03-06
flights
Moscow
Istanbul

Istanbul has become one of the most popular destinations from Moscow. With multiple daily flights and competition between Turkish and Russian carriers, prices can be surprisingly low if you know when and how to book.

Best Airlines for Moscow → Istanbul

  • Turkish Airlines — best service, direct flights, 3-3.5 hours

  • Pegasus Airlines — budget option, often 40-60% cheaper

  • Aeroflot — direct flights from Sheremetyevo (SVO)

  • Nordwind — seasonal charter flights at great prices

When to Book for Best Prices

The cheapest time to fly Moscow-Istanbul is November through March (excluding New Year holidays). Summer (June-August) is peak season with prices 2-3x higher. Book 6-8 weeks in advance for the sweet spot.

Price Guide

  • Low season (Nov-Mar): $100-180 round trip

  • Shoulder season (Apr-May, Sep-Oct): $150-250

  • High season (Jun-Aug): $250-400

  • New Year / holidays: $350-500+

Search SVO → IST flights now

Where to Stay in Istanbul on a Budget

Sultanahmet and Fatih are the best areas for budget travelers — close to major attractions with hotels from $30/night. Beyoğlu/Taksim is more modern and lively, with mid-range options from $50/night.

Find hotels in Istanbul

💡 Money-Saving Tips

  • Fly on weekdays — weekend flights are 20-30% more expensive

  • Consider Sabiha Gökçen Airport (SAW) instead of Istanbul Airport (IST) — often cheaper

  • Use Istanbul Kart for public transport — much cheaper than taxis

  • Book hotels in Laleli or Aksaray for best value

Cheap flights — in your inbox

Subscribe to get the best flight and hotel deals. No spam, just great prices.
